text:
Here are similar IoT energy monitoring projects for your literature survey:

## Academic Papers & Research Projects:

1. **"Future of Energy Management Models in Smart Homes"** (Springer, 2025)
   - Systematic literature review of smart home energy management
   - Covers research trends, gaps, and future directions

2. **"IoT-Enabled Real-Time Energy Monitoring System"** (2025)
   - Real-time energy monitoring and analysis
   - Focus on predictive maintenance and efficient power management

3. **"Design and Implementation of an IoT Based Home Energy Monitoring System"** (IEEE, 2025)
   - Hardware implementation with IoT integration
   - Smart home energy management approaches

4. **"IoT Based Smart Energy Consumption Prediction for Home Appliances"** (2025)
   - Energy consumption prediction algorithms
   - Machine learning for appliance-level monitoring

5. **"A smart energy monitoring system using ESP32 microcontroller"** (ScienceDirect, 2024)
   - ESP32-based monitoring with Blynk application
   - Real-time power consumption tracking

6. **"An Open Source IoT-Integrated Interactive Smart Energy Monitoring System"** (OSF, 2024)
   - ESP32 with PZEM-004T sensor (0-100A range)
   - Telegram bot integration and mobile app

7. **"Designing an intelligent smart energy monitoring system for optimizing PV energy"** (Springer, 2024)
   - XBee communication protocol
   - Smart plugs with power characteristics measurement

## Key Technologies in Similar Projects:
- **Hardware**: ESP32, PZEM-004T sensors, XBee modules
- **Communication**: MQTT, HTTP, Zigbee, WiFi
- **Frameworks**: Blynk, MIT App Inventor, Telegram bots
- **Features**: Real-time monitoring, predictive analytics, appliance-level tracking

These projects share similar functionality with your EcoTrack project and would make excellent references for your literature survey section.
